title: RapidMeta Infectious Disease | BPaL / BPaLM Short Regimens for MDR / XDR Tuberculosis v1.0
hero_h2: BPaL / BPaLM Short Regimens for Rifampicin-Resistant / MDR Tuberculosis

pico.pop: Adults with rifampicin-resistant or multidrug-resistant pulmonary tuberculosis (MDR/XDR-TB), microbiologically confirmed
pico.int: Bedaquiline + pretomanid + linezolid (+/- moxifloxacin) [BPaL / BPaLM] short oral regimen, 6-9 months
pico.comp: Locally-accepted standard MDR-TB treatment (typically 9-20 months including injectable agent)
pico.out: Favorable composite outcome at week 72-76 (cure or completion without recurrence; absence of death, treatment failure, recurrence, discontinuation, or loss to follow-up)
pico.subgroup: HIV co-infection status, baseline cavitation, fluoroquinolone resistance, prior MDR-TB treatment

real_data_entries.name: TB-PRACTECAL
real_data_entries.group: Rifampicin-resistant TB, BPaLM 24-week vs locally-accepted standard of care (Belarus / South Africa / Uzbekistan; N=552 modified-ITT)

allOutcomes.title: Favorable outcome at week 72 (composite, modified ITT; primary)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Nyang'wa BT et al. NEJM 2022;387:2331-2343 (TB-PRACTECAL phase 2-3 BPaLM).

real_data_entries.name: STREAM-2
real_data_entries.group: Rifampicin-resistant TB, Stage 2B all-oral 9-month bedaquiline + linezolid + levofloxacin + clofazimine + pyrazinamide vs Stage 2A 9-month standard with injectable (Ethiopia / South Africa / India / Mongolia / Vietnam / Georgia)

allOutcomes.title: Favorable outcome at week 76 (modified ITT; primary)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Goodall RL et al. Lancet 2022;400:1858-1868 (STREAM Stage 2, Stage 2B all-oral 9-month).

real_data_entries.name: endTB-MDR
real_data_entries.group: Rifampicin-resistant TB, BLMz arm (bedaquiline + linezolid + moxifloxacin + pyrazinamide, 9-month) vs locally-accepted control (multi-country: Georgia, India, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Lesotho, Pakistan, Peru, South Africa, Vietnam)
real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Mitnick CD et al. NEJM 2024 (endTB MDR-TB short-regimen RCT, BLMz arm).
